  "findings": [
    "Missing tracer wire on non-metallic pipe during backfill operations"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt backfilling operations immediately",
    "Expose the pipe as necessary to install the continuous tracer wire",
    "Secure the tracer wire to the pipe and bring leads to grade before resuming backfill"
  ],
  "rationale": "Non-metallic piping requires a continuous tracer wire or other approved method to be installed adjacent to the piping for future location purposes. Backfilling over non-metallic pipe without installing the tracer wire is a sequence violation that results in an installed-defective condition, as the pipe cannot be located once buried.",
  "references": [
    "IPC 306",
    "Project Specifications"
  ]
}
